item.title: E-Commerce Mobile App
item.description:
A fully-featured e-commerce application built with Flutter and Firebase.

Features

  • Product catalog with search and filters
  • Secure user authentication
  • Shopping cart and checkout
  • Real-time order tracking
  • Payment integration with Stripe

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Flutter
  • Backend: Firebase
  • Database: Firestore
  • Payments: Stripe API

Impact

The app handles 10,000+ active users with a 4.8-star rating on app stores.

item.title: Task Management System
item.description:
A collaborative task management web application for teams.

Features

  • Real-time collaboration
  • Task assignment and tracking
  • Team workspaces
  • Activity timeline
  • Multiple view options (list, board, timeline)

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React with TypeScript
  • Backend: Node.js + Express
  • Database: PostgreSQL
  • Real-time: WebSockets

Results

Used by 500+ teams managing 100,000+ tasks monthly.

item.title: Getting Started with Hugo
item.description: A comprehensive guide to setting up and deploying a Hugo static site.

item.title: 5 Essential Web Performance Tips
item.description: Practical strategies to improve your website's loading speed and performance.

item.title: Analytics Dashboard
item.description:
A comprehensive analytics dashboard for SaaS applications.

Features

  • Real-time data visualization
  • Custom report generation
  • Advanced filtering and segmentation
  • Multi-user access control
  • Data export capabilities

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React + D3.js
  • Backend: Go (Gin framework)
  • Database: ClickHouse for time-series data
  • Caching: Redis

Performance

Handles millions of events with sub-second query responses.

item.title: Flutter Best Practices for Production Apps
item.description: Essential practices for building robust, scalable Flutter applications.

item.title: Technical Advisor — Coding Ninja Club
item.description: Guided over 100 students in technical projects, enhancing their problem-solving abilities and code quality.

item.title: Web Developer Intern — IIT Bombay x Intrainz
item.description: Collaborated with teams to design and develop responsive web applications for IIT Bombay’s educational initiatives.
